arts.ttl: FPL notes: Bradley impresses, Richarlison injury, Tel + Danso debuts
arts.sum: Scout Notes from Thursday’s EFL Cup semi-final The post FPL notes: Bradley impresses, Richarlison injury, Tel + Danso debuts appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's defiant message to his critics as Tottenham boss fights to save his job - 'irrelevant to me what other people's opinions are'
arts.sum: As criticism intensifies and the exit door at Spurs looms ever closer, Ange Postecoglou remains largely unconcerned. But defeat against Aston Villa in the FA Cup could quickly change his mood.

arts.ttl: Inside Marcus Rashford's first week at Aston Villa: Training on his days off, the truth about THAT unveiling photo and 'striker whisperer' Unai Emery's tailor-made plan to get Man United outcast back to his best
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Marcus Rashford, the exiled prince of Manchester United, has come to the place where footballers mix with true royalty.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's 'underestimated' Liverpool star sets sets eight-year record in Tottenham win
arts.sum: Liverpool reached the final of the Carabao Cup with a dominant victory against Tottenham with one Reds star once again catching the eye after glowing praise from Arne Slot

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on when Tottenham's injured players return, pundits and Richarlison
arts.sum: We're an easy mark at the moment, and look after last night, there are times you've just got to take it, keep your counsel and atone for it in the way that only really matters and that is with playing the football I know we can. Spurs arrived back at their Hotspur Way training complex at 2am on Friday after their heavy Carabao Cup semi-final second leg loss at Liverpool but there was no rest for Postecoglou is he had hold an FA Cup press conference.

arts.ttl: It's easy to stick boot in to Spurs - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham head coach Ange Postecoglou says the criticism of his side is "really easy".

arts.ttl: Spurs sign Bayern Munich forward Tel on loan
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur sign France Under-21s forward Mathys Tel from Bayern Munich on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou gives Micky van de Ven update and fires back at Leyton Orient boss Richie Wellens
arts.sum: It’s a big game and hopefully a positive result and then over the next couple of weeks we’ll get some significant players back, which I think will help." Ange Postecoglou has given a further update on Micky van de Ven and explained which Tottenham players should be back from injury next week as well as firing back at Leyton Orient boss Richie Wellens.

arts.ttl: What Unai Emery told Donyell Malen after leaving him out of Villa's Champions League squad
arts.sum: Unai Emery admits it wasn't easy for him to tell Donyell Malen that he had been left out of Aston Villa's Champions League squad for the knockout rounds. Villa signed five players in the winter window, starting with Malen and Andres Garcia for a combined £26m.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou responds to injury jibe from League One boss in brutal fashion
arts.sum: Tottenham take on Leyton Orient in the FA Cup clash this weekend with Ange Postecoglou responding to Richie Wellens - who joked about the amount of injuries he's struggling with
